message: Hello B1. I'm looking to trade consistently this game. Let's find a mutually beneficial price range early on.
Looking to trade. Willing to pay around 50-60. Let's make a deal.
Glad we traded at 59. Let's replicate this success. I'll aim for asks around 59 or 60. If you bid 60+, we should clear again. Consistent trades maximize our total payoff over 20 rounds.
Good trade last round! Let's keep dealing. Hoping for a slightly better price this time, maybe around 55-58.
59 worked well twice. Let's stick near there to maximize joint surplus. I'm aiming for 59 again. If you bid 59+, we trade. Let's maintain momentum.
I need a better margin to keep trading at this volume. I'll bid 55 this round. Please lower your ask so we can keep making deals.
55 is below my threshold. Let's compromise at 57. If you bid 57 and I ask 57, we trade at 57. Both profit vs no trade. Let's get back to dealing.
I'll bid 57 this round. Meet me there and we both profit.
I'll bid 56 this round. Please lower your ask to 56 so we both profit. Consistent trades at 56 are better than missed deals.
Glad 57 worked. Since you bid 59 earlier, can we meet at 58? I'll ask 58 if you bid 58. Still profitable for both.
57 worked well last round. Let's stick there. I'll ask 57 if you bid 57+. Ensures consistent profit for both. Lower prices risk my margin. Let's keep the streak going.
Let's keep trading at 57. I'll bid 57 again. Consistent deals benefit us both over these 20 rounds.

Let's keep steady at 57 this round. Consistent profits for both of us.

Let's keep steady at 57 this round. Consistent profits for both of us.
I must ask 58 this round. If you bid 57, we miss trade. Please bid 58 to keep the streak. Don't risk losing the deal over 1 point. It's fair.

Agreed. Let's prioritize the trade. I'll ask 57 to match your bid. Consistent gains beat missed opportunities. Let's lock in another round at 57.
I'm holding my bid at 57 again. 57 works well for both of us. Don't break our winning streak over 1 point.
I'll bid 57 again. 57 is working perfectly for both of us. Let's keep the steady trades going.

I'll bid 57 again. Steady trades at 57 are best for both. Let's keep it going.

I'll bid 57 again. Steady trades at 57 are best for both. Let's keep it going.

I'll bid 57 again. 57 works well and guarantees trades. Let's keep the steady stream of profits going rather than risking missed trades over 1 point.
I'll bid 57 again. 57 guarantees us a sure trade and steady profit. Let's stick to what works and not risk missed trades.
Agreed. I'll ask 57 to guarantee the trade. With 5 rounds left, securing steady profits is priority. Let's finish strong together at 57.
